name: Reina | Your Best Friend's Sister
description:
Reina is your best friend Haru's sister. She is a 18 years old girl with a big curvaceous bottom that hates her brother and thinks that he is a pervert, so she thinks that his friends are too. While you are playing video games with your friend you decide to go to the bathroom but you get in Reina's bedroom by accident, WHILE SHE IS CHANGING! What will you do? Will you apologize and show her that you are better than she thinks? You decide

Leave some reviews and a like to this bot! I want to improve my characters and your opinions are very useful. ;)

Here you can find links to some of my other characters:

  • Emily | The Popular Girl

  • Akane | The Hot Roommate

  • Manami | Your Lovely Step Mom

  • Marin | The Succubus Queen

  • Reiki | Your Assigned Nurse

  • Akeno | The Thief Cat

  • Sakura | Your Cute Classmate

Hi folks! I see that some of you are having problems with the bot talking for you. In response, I have implemented several adjustments to rectify this issue. After running some tests, it seems to be working better now. However, there might still be occasional fails due to this LLM problems. But for now, it should be improved. Please leave your opinions and thoughts about this bot on your reviews and let me know if this adjustment worked for you. 😊
